name: Madison Education Assoc.
description_short: Madison Education Association Credit Union is a federally insured credit union serving the Madison, FL area with membership-based financial services and NCUA protection.
description_long:
Madison Education Association Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative based in Madison, Florida. The organization is positioned as a community credit union, serving members in the North Florida region with a physical branch location at 302 NE Sumter in Madison. The credit union model emphasizes member benefits and democratic governance compared to traditional for-profit banks.

Based on the website content provided, Madison Education Association Credit Union offers standard credit union services typical of community-based financial institutions. The organization maintains federally insured accounts and operates under regulatory oversight as a credit union entity. Members receive the benefit of NCUA insurance coverage on their deposits, which is a hallmark of legitimate credit union operations.

What distinguishes this institution is its focus on serving the education sector community in Madison, Florida, as reflected in its name. The credit union appears to maintain a local, community-oriented approach with direct member contact available through their Madison branch office and phone lines. As a credit union rather than a bank, it operates on a not-for-profit basis with earnings returned to members.

The website is relatively minimal in terms of detailed service information, containing only basic contact details and regulatory disclosures rather than comprehensive product descriptions. This suggests either a smaller regional institution or a website that may need updating with more service details. Prospective members would need to contact the credit union directly via phone or in-person to learn about specific loan products, savings accounts, interest rates, and membership requirements. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Member savings accounts with NCUA federal insurance
Deposit accounts backed by federal insurance protection
Local branch banking at Madison, FL location
pros: Federally insured deposits up to $250,000 through NCUA, a federal agency
Member-owned credit union structure means earnings are returned to members rather than shareholders
Local community focus based in Madison, Florida with direct member access
Backed by the full faith and credit of the United States Government through NCUA insurance
Established organization with copyright notice dating to at least 2023
Direct phone contact available for member inquiries
cons: Website lacks detailed information about specific products, services, rates, and fees
Limited online presence and product descriptions may indicate outdated web infrastructure
No information about online banking capabilities or digital services
Unclear membership eligibility requirements based on available website content
No mention of loan products, interest rates, or specific account types available
best_for: Education sector employees in the Madison, Florida area seeking community-based banking
Local residents prioritizing NCUA-insured accounts and member-owned financial institutions
Members valuing direct personal relationships with their financial institution
diagnosis: Madison Education Association Credit Union is best for education sector employees and residents of Madison, Florida seeking traditional credit union banking with federal NCUA insurance protection. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal product information, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly by phone or visit in person to understand specific offerings, rates, and membership eligibility requirements.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Madison Education Association Credit Union is a federally insured credit union serving Madison, FL with membership-based financial services.
